title: 天皇賞（秋）の後に・稲妻先勝！

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
It's Tamamo Cross! Tamamo Cross wins! The
senior racer holds her ground and bests Oguri
Cap!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
It feels like only yesterday that she won the
Takarazuka Kinen, and today she has dominated
the autumn Tenno Sho!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Yeeeah!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: I did it! Trainer, I DID IT!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Damn straight! I'm number one! I was in it to win
it, and I did! Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Until now, Tamamo Cross has been running with
her family in mind. But today, she burns hotter
than ever.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A pure athlete through and through, she burned
white-hot. She pooled all her attention and
energy into this race, and it shows.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross's Little Brother
text_block_list.text: Dad, Tama did it! She won!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross's Father
text_block_list.text:
She sure did... But winnin' or losin' isn't important
to me no more... As long as she gets the fans all
hyped up 'n makes it to the finish line in one
piece, that's plenty for me.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross's Father
text_block_list.text:
Tama's turned this family around... She could stop
now 'n my heart'd never stop swellin' with pride...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross's Little Sister
text_block_list.text:
Tama's so amazin'! I wanna run just like her one
day!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
...Well done, Tama. I may have lost, but today,
for the first time...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I used everything I had in a race. And it's because
I raced with you, Tama.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
The feelin's mutual. I used up all my energy for
the first time today.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
And the box lunch I ate before today's race was
extra tasty. Maybe that played a part too.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
But we're on the same page here, right? Today
was just our first battle. This isn't over yet. Not by
a long shot.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Our next race will be the Arima Kinen. That's gonna be the real showdown. Where the score gets settled once and for all...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I know. But... that won't be enough for me.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I want to keep running with you, Tama. On and
on. So I'll be waiting for you at the Japan Cup.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Da heck?! You wanna run three G1 races in a
row? Oguri, you're still a classic-year runner...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I'll be fine, don't worry. ...I am Oguri Cap, you know.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
No matter the distance, track type or schedule,
there's no race I can't handle. As long as I keep
dreaming, I can keep running.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: That night...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, what should we do next? There's the
Japan Cup, or we could...
choice_data_list: Let's set our sights on the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Oh, uh, right. But the Japan Cup's...
choice_data_list:
Let's make that decision once we're a little
closer to the event.

Let's make that decision once we're a little
closer to the event.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross's performance today was strong.
Ideally we'd just maintain this momentum, but the
problem is...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Trainer. I can... still get stronger. Oguri helped me
realize that.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I'm nowhere near perfect, but I still won today. By
the time the Arima Kinen rolls 'round, I'll be at my
peak... probably.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
And when I am, I won't be losin' to nobody! I'll be
freakin' unstoppable! ...Probably!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
But... if anyone was able to overtake me at that
point... at my very best...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: It'd have to be you-know-who... when she's at her very best.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: That's just how amazin' she is.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though Tamamo Cross's strength came out on
top this time, Oguri Cap wasn't far behind... We'll
have to wait until the Arima Kinen to see how
their legendary battle will play out.
